mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (id, username, password, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{roleId}, #{status}, now(), now())
INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{roleId}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
username = #{username},
password = #{password},
nickname = #{nickname},
email = #{email},
role_id = #{roleId},
status = #{status},
max_storage_bytes = #{maxStorageBytes},
note_used_storage_bytes = #{noteUsedStorageBytes},
img_used_storage_bytes = #{imageUsedStorageBytes},
update_time = now()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, nickname, email, role_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
